final_verdict.explanation: stub_v1 derives target_lane from baseline_context.target_lane, not route_context.preferred_lane. When baseline emits stop/follow → target_lane='current', the metric sees misalignment with preferred_lane='right'. This is an adapter stub design gap, not a shadow contract violation.
stub_artifact_cases: adjacent_right_unsafe_hold (systematic fail — metric inapplicable to stop-dominated case)
arbitration_stop_during_prepare_right (partial fail in stop phase — expected)

case_verdicts.verdict: NOT a real pass. Metric is measuring synthetic preferred_lane='current' agreeing with synthetic target_lane='current'. Fix synthetic frame builder before trusting this value.
Trivially correct, zero information. Acceptable as-is. Do not attempt to extract alignment signal from straight-route stop cases.
Breach of 0.65 threshold is expected and structurally explained by the arbitration pattern. NOT a true tactical error. Apply per-case override: threshold = 0.30 for this case.

Systematic threshold breach on every run. Metric is wrong tool for this case: stop-dominated preferred_lane='right' case will always show near-0 alignment because target_lane is correctly 'current' during stop. Do NOT use alignment gate for this case type.

recommendations.title: Fix _synthesize_frames_from_frozen() — target_lane must use corridor.preferred_lane
recommendations.action: In stage7_agent_shadow_online_smoke.py _synthesize_frames_from_frozen(), change target_lane from hardcoded 'current' to str(corridor.get('preferred_lane') or 'current')
recommendations.impact: Removes false-positive 1.0 alignment on ml_right_positive_core. Makes the metric meaningful for LC cases using synthetic frames.
recommendations.affects_gate: No change to pass/fail — alignment threshold remains. Metric value becomes more realistic.

recommendations.title: Fix stub adapter — derive target_lane from route_context.preferred_lane when intent is not LC
recommendations.action: In agent_shadow_adapter.py _call_stub(), when baseline intent is keep_lane/follow/stop/slow_down, set target_lane = route_context.get('preferred_lane', 'current') instead of baseline_context.get('target_lane', 'current')
recommendations.impact: Removes stub_limit misalignment on keep_right/keep_left cases during non-LC frames. Makes alignment rate reflect route intent, not just baseline_context.target_lane.
recommendations.affects_gate: YES — alignment rate will increase for keep_right/keep_left cases. May convert soft_guardrail warnings to passes.
recommendations.important_caveat: Only apply when not in LC phase. During LC intent, target_lane should come from baseline.
recommendations.do_not_do: Do NOT change the validation or contract logic. Only change the stub's lane target derivation.

recommendations.title: Add per-case alignment threshold override for stop-dominated cases
recommendations.action: In stage7_controlled_expansion_gate.json, add per-case threshold override: arbitration_stop_during_prepare_right.agent_route_alignment_rate.min = 0.30. adjacent_right_unsafe_hold = exempt from alignment gate.
recommendations.rationale: alignment_rate metric is not meaningful for stop-dominated cases where preferred_lane != 'current'. Penalizing correct stop behavior as 'misaligned' is a metric design error.
recommendations.affects_gate: YES — prevents false hard failures on arbitration case. Must not change global default threshold.
recommendations.do_not_do: Do NOT raise global threshold to 0.30. The 0.65/0.70 default is correct for LC-dominated cases.

recommendations.title: Wire live stage3b_behavior_timeline for ml_right and stop_follow cases
recommendations.action: Add missing stage3b_behavior_timeline artifact paths to case spec yamls for ml_right_positive_core and stop_follow_ambiguity_core. Confirm outputs/stage3b/ directories exist.
recommendations.impact: Eliminates synthetic frame fallback. All four warning categories become accurate because metric operates on real baseline frames.
recommendations.affects_gate: INDIRECT — alignment values will change when synthetic frames are replaced with live timeline. Run at least 1 pass after timeline is wired to establish new baseline alignment values.

recommendations.title: Do NOT fix: accept stub_v1 zero-disagreement alignment inflation
recommendations.action: No action. stub_v1 mirrors baseline. Zero disagreement = zero disagreement-driven misalignment. Alignment from stub_v1 = always high when preferred_lane matches target_lane. This is expected behavior.
recommendations.rationale: stub_v1 is a contract pipeline validator, not a real agent. Alignment signal from stub is valuable only as a lower bound / sanity check. When LLM adapter is wired, alignment will produce real variance.

next_steps.action: Apply R1 immediately — fix _synthesize_frames_from_frozen() to use corridor.preferred_lane as target_lane
next_steps.why: Removes false-positive 1.0 alignment measurement that makes the metric misleading for ml_right_positive_core

next_steps.action: Apply R3 — add per-case threshold override in expansion gate before running arbitration_stop case
next_steps.why: Without this, arbitration_stop will always breach 0.65 threshold. Breach is expected and not a real contract issue.

next_steps.action: Apply R4 — wire live stage3b timelines for current 2-case smoke set
next_steps.why: Current alignment values (both 1.0) are synthetic artifacts, not real measurements. Live timeline required for any meaningful alignment analysis.

next_steps.action: Apply R2 — stub adapter preferred_lane derivation fix (before LLM adapter runs)
next_steps.why: Ensures stub establishes accurate alignment baseline so LLM adapter deviations are detectable

next_steps.action: Re-run stage7c_online_shadow_smoke after R1+R4. Compare alignment values. Validate new values against expected ranges in case_breakdown.
next_steps.why: Need to confirm alignment becomes meaningful before declaring alignment gate as a signal quality metric

what_not_to_do: Do NOT lower global alignment threshold from 0.65/0.70 to make cases pass
Do NOT add adjacent_right_unsafe_hold to Stage 7C expansion (status=provisional, alignment gate will always fail)
Do NOT interpret current 1.0 values as proof alignment is healthy — they are measurement artifacts
Do NOT discuss assist mode based on alignment analysis
Do NOT skip R3 before running arbitration_stop in 4-case expansion
